scope: Runnable entrypoint quick reference for demos and core replay/probe tooling around the two Tencent Video interfaces

demos.name: python_demo
demos.intent: Resolve URL/CID/VID into current API1/API2 output and print human or JSON summaries
notes: The Python demo can consume a prebuilt replay environment JSON via `--env-json` and select a named environment via `--env-name`.

demos.name: go_demo
demos.intent: Go wrapper with the same public demo surfaces as the Python entrypoint
notes: The Go demo can consume a prebuilt replay environment JSON via `-env-json` and select a named environment via `-env-name`.
The Go demo distinguishes 'flag omitted' from 'explicit empty callback' for `-api2-callback`.
This workspace already includes a runnable `go.exe` wrapper binary; current caller-facing examples use `go.exe -cid <CID> -json`.

demos.name: demo_validation_runner
demos.intent: Replay the highest-value anonymous direct-call demo surfaces for Python/Go and emit one machine-readable validation summary
notes: This runner is scoped to already-documented anonymous direct-call demo surfaces such as canonical XML, API1 tid=453 cover-shell-only branch, API1 tid=476 imgtag-family ultra-thin shell, API1 tid=483 video_ids-led thin shell, API1 tid=506 empty-valued field shell, API1 tid=537 shell probe, JSONP callback override, alternate positive tid 488/502/506/540/541, canonical batch lookup, and the all-invalid JSONP consumer-rule path.
A passing rerun strengthens example replayability, but it does not close aged-cookie or login-state gaps by itself.

demos.name: raw_http_validation_runner
demos.intent: Replay the highest-value caller-facing raw HTTP rows directly against API1/API2 and emit one machine-readable validation summary
notes: This runner validates raw HTTP behavior only in the current anonymous direct-call scope.

It now also includes the dedicated API1 tid=453 cover-shell-only row, tid=476 imgtag-family ultra-thin row, tid=483 video_ids-led thin shell row, tid=506 empty-valued field shell row, and API1 tid=537 shell-probe row in addition to canonical API1 and API2 surfaces.

Alternate tid 488/502/540/541 rows are expected to succeed as caller-selected positive shells rather than canonical-full detail rows, while API2 tid=506 is expected to stay on its near-empty success-shell profile.
The current batch row is a canonical multi-VID spot-check on the known batch-capable branch, not a fresh 32-slot saturation replay.

environment_replay_tooling.name: cookie_env_builder
environment_replay_tooling.intent: Turn raw Cookie header material into replay env-json input

environment_replay_tooling.name: environment_matrix_probe
environment_replay_tooling.intent: Run API1/API2 contract cases plus representative page-shape comparison across header environments

environment_replay_tooling.name: replay_bundle_runner
environment_replay_tooling.intent: One-command environment replay wrapper for env build, matrix replay, and semantics replay
notes: When `--env-json` is provided, the runner trusts the env names stored in that file for semantics replay.
If child-process writes into workspace analysis paths are flaky, prefer `--artifact-output-dir` and `--subprocess-output-dir` under a temp directory.

parameter_probes.name: api_contract_probe
parameter_probes.intent: Probe core parameter validation and response-shell behavior for `tid / idlist / appid / appkey / otype / union_platform` on the two main interfaces
notes: Default `--case-profile baseline` keeps the original contract matrix.

Use `--case-profile appid_numeric_focus` to reproduce the newly confirmed three-family numeric-appid split: `appid=1` success bypass, far noncanonical numeric `appid no find`, and the tested near-canonical `appkey error` band.
Use `--case-profile appid_numeric_band --appid-start <N> --appid-end <M>` when you want a contiguous appid sweep around a suspected boundary instead of a few representative points.

parameter_probes.name: param_semantics_probe
parameter_probes.intent: Probe auth-ish keys, reserved keys, callback families, repeated-key order, and wrong-appkey branches
notes: Use `--case-profile callback_contract` for the smallest high-value callback precedence and wrong-appkey error-shell matrix.
The current callback-contract conclusion is replay-stable in the tested real anonymous PC Web and Mobile H5 environments.

parameter_probes.name: positive_tid_probe
parameter_probes.intent: Sweep candidate positive tid bands on API1/API2
notes: For lower-edge anonymous triage, the new 524-529 narrow-band probe found no new positive tid and isolated 525 as a stable -111013 local error-family island.
If a new narrow band produces anything other than ordinary -111005, rerun a second sample on the same band before treating it as a meaningful edge.

current_best_usage_order: Direct caller usage: start from the Python/Go demos.
If you need to revalidate the public Python/Go demo surfaces end to end, run the demo validation runner next.
If you need direct caller-facing proof at the raw HTTP layer, run the raw HTTP validation runner after the demo rerun.
Anonymous or replay contract comparisons: use the environment matrix probe.
If you need the core branch/validation behavior of explicit parameters such as appid/appkey rather than callback or repeated-key semantics, run the API contract probe before the semantics probe.
Parameter behavior and callback-tail work: use the semantics probe directly or through the replay bundle runner; `callback_contract` is now the smallest dedicated wrapper-contract profile.

Positive tid band discovery: use the positive tid probe for narrow bands first; the current 524-529 anonymous lower-edge probe found no new positive tid and downgraded wider blind tid scanning priority.

ready_to_run_templates.name: demo_validation_full_rerun
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun the current anonymous direct-call demo surface set for Python and Go, then write one summary artifact.
best_first_checks: Look at `failed_surfaces` first; it should stay empty on a clean anonymous rerun.
If an alternate tid surface flips from thin shell to fuller detail, treat that as fresh evidence to inspect rather than auto-upgrading the branch contract.

ready_to_run_templates.name: demo_validation_entrypoint_and_override_rerun
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun the added entrypoint/override demo surfaces: URL chain, multi-CID, API1 tid=453/476/483/506/537 selected shells, API2 tid=506 near-empty shell, batch-size, union_platform, and tid541+0003 spot-check.
best_first_checks: Check that the URL surfaces extract the expected CID before the canonical API chain succeeds.
Check that multi-CID and batch-size surfaces keep non-empty multi-row output instead of silently collapsing to a single-row path.
Check that the tid=453 surfaces stay on the documented positive cover-shell-only branch with empty video_ids rather than silently behaving like canonical tid=431.
Check that the tid=476 surfaces stay on the documented imgtag-family ultra-thin shell with qbox_imgtag={} rather than silently behaving like canonical tid=431 or tid=506.
Check that the tid=483 surfaces stay on the documented video_ids-led thin shell: video_ids remain non-empty while cover title/type/pay_status stay empty.
Check that the tid=506 surfaces stay on the documented empty-valued field shell rather than silently behaving like canonical tid=431 or tid=476.
Check that the tid=537 probe surfaces stay on the documented sample-less shell branch rather than silently behaving like canonical tid=431.
Check that the API2 tid=506 surfaces stay on the documented near-empty success shell rather than silently materializing a thicker positive-detail row.
Check that union_platform override still stays on the documented anonymous branch and that tid=541+0003 remains a thin positive shell.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_full_rerun
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun the current anonymous caller-facing raw HTTP surface set and write one summary artifact.
best_first_checks: Look at `failed_surfaces` first; it should stay empty on a clean anonymous raw rerun.
Read 540/541 and 541+0003 as thin positive shell confirmations, not canonical-full detail proofs.
Read the batch row as a canonical multi-VID spot-check on the known batch-capable branch, not as a fresh 32-slot saturation replay.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_tid537_probe
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun just the dedicated caller-facing raw HTTP API1 tid=537 shell probe row.
best_first_checks: Check that errorno stays 0 while cover_title stays empty and video_ids_count stays 0.
Treat success as shell-only probe success, not as a canonical positive cover row.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_tid453_cover_shell_only
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun just the dedicated caller-facing raw HTTP API1 tid=453 positive cover-shell-only row.
best_first_checks: Check that errorno stays 0 while cover_title stays non-empty and video_ids_count stays 0.
Treat success as a cover-only positive shell, not as canonical tid=431 parity.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_tid476_imgtag_ultra_thin_shell
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun just the dedicated caller-facing raw HTTP API1 tid=476 imgtag-family ultra-thin shell row.
best_first_checks: Check that errorno stays 0 while cover_title stays empty and video_ids_count stays 0.
Check that qbox_imgtag remains non-empty as {} and that the imgtag-family extra-field set remains visible.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_tid506_empty_valued_field_shell
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun just the dedicated caller-facing raw HTTP API1 tid=506 empty-valued field shell row.
best_first_checks: Check that errorno stays 0 while cover_title stays empty and video_ids_count stays 0.
Check that the extra-field family stays on the 9-key empty-valued set and does not grow qbox_imgtag.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_tid483_video_ids_led_thin_shell
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun just the dedicated caller-facing raw HTTP API1 tid=483 video_ids-led thin shell row.
best_first_checks: Check that errorno stays 0 while video_ids_count stays non-zero.
Check that cover title/type/pay_status stay empty so the row remains on the documented video_ids-led thin shell.

ready_to_run_templates.name: raw_http_validation_api2_tid506_near_empty_success_shell
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Rerun just the dedicated caller-facing raw HTTP API2 tid=506 near-empty success shell row.
best_first_checks: Check that top-level errorno stays 0 and row-level retcode stays 0 on the validated sample.
Check that the caller-facing row still stays effectively empty_shell=true rather than materializing a thicker positive-detail row.

ready_to_run_templates.name: aged_cookie_env_build
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Build env-json for the aged-cookie replay branch from a desktop Cookie header file.

ready_to_run_templates.name: login_state_env_build
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Build env-json for the login-state replay branch from a desktop Cookie header file.

ready_to_run_templates.name: aged_cookie_environment_matrix
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Replay the canonical API1/API2 contract matrix under the aged-cookie environment.
best_first_checks: api1 baseline_single_valid
api1 missing_tid
api1 canonical_appid_missing_appkey
api2 baseline_xml_single
api2 otype_json_single
api2 all_invalid_jsonp_batch
api2 duplicate_and_empty_slots_json
api2 dup33_json

ready_to_run_templates.name: login_state_environment_matrix
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Replay the canonical API1/API2 contract matrix under the login-state environment.
best_first_checks: api1 baseline_single_valid
api1 missing_tid
api1 canonical_appid_missing_appkey
api2 baseline_xml_single
api2 otype_json_single
api2 all_invalid_jsonp_batch
api2 duplicate_and_empty_slots_json
api2 dup33_json

ready_to_run_templates.name: aged_cookie_full_bundle
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Run the aged-cookie full semantics bundle, including the highest-value parameter branches beyond the plain contract matrix.
best_first_checks: whether union_platform starts to matter
whether auth-ish extra keys start to matter
whether 540/541 shell thickness changes under aged-cookie

ready_to_run_templates.name: login_state_full_bundle
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Run the login-state full semantics bundle, including the highest-value parameter branches beyond the plain contract matrix.
best_first_checks: whether union_platform starts to matter
whether auth-ish extra keys start to matter
whether 540/541 shell thickness changes under login-state

ready_to_run_templates.name: callback_contract_anonymous
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Run the smallest callback precedence and wrong-appkey error-shell contract matrix in the anonymous direct-call scope.
best_first_checks: Check that repeated callback cases still show first-value-wins.
Check that wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper control.

ready_to_run_templates.name: callback_contract_real_cookie_pc
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Replay the callback contract matrix under the real anonymous PC Web visitor-cookie environment.
best_first_checks: Check that repeated callback still stays first-value-wins.
Check that wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper control instead of reverting to the default wrapper.

ready_to_run_templates.name: callback_contract_real_cookie_mobile
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Replay the callback contract matrix under the real anonymous Mobile H5 visitor-cookie environment.
best_first_checks: Check that repeated callback still stays first-value-wins.
Check that wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper control instead of reverting to the default wrapper.

ready_to_run_templates.name: positive_tid_probe_api2_524_529
ready_to_run_templates.intent: Run the current highest-value anonymous lower-edge API2 tid narrow band with one API1 positive control anchor.
best_first_checks: If 524 and 526-529 all stay on -111005 while 525 stays on -111013, read this as a tightened anonymous lower-edge error boundary rather than a new positive front.
Only if a nonstandard point appears, rerun the same narrow band on a second sample before broadening tid discovery again.
